case_title: GCFS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. SALGUERO, ROSALINA AKA ROSALINA S SALGUERO et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-09-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE JUDGMENT. NOTE: ONLY A STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT WAS FILED JAN-26-2012. THERE WAS NO APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR FORM OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. THE JUL-10-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ROSALINA AKA ROSALINA S SALGUERO $3,558.86 PRINCIPAL, $690.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,801.10 INTEREST, $462.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,511.96, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
